## [00:00 - 03:03]

Hey guys in this video, we're going to go over how to set up a business manager and how to create a business manager account So this tool is going to be critical for you as you grow and even if you don't own an ad agency or digital marketing business It's going to be great to give access to people and contractors and maybe agencies as well Who so that you don't have to necessarily give out your own passwords and so that they don't have to use their own personal profile Basically, this is a tool that just helps broker relationships between Facebook assets and your team and it's essentially Just one hub to manage all of the pages all the ad accounts and all of the people in one spot so something unique about business manager it has a URL distinct to business managers, so it's business dot Facebook dot com and that's how you reach this page So Essentially you want to go up here and click create account So it's going to prompt you to log into your personal Facebook profile and if you click log in there It's gonna log you into that personal Facebook profile You need to be logged into your personal Facebook profile in order to create a business manager account So you need to have a personal profile linked into your business manager So here then you just go create account and it's going to prompt you for your business and account name So you don't need to think too long and hard about this. This is going to be either the name of your business or the name of your agency So here just type in test FATC your name your business email so test at test Agency.com And then you click next And then you're going to be prompted to add in your country or street address your city and Basically, the reason Facebook's asking for this is because they want to make sure that they're putting every possible block up so that People can't create fake business managers and also so that people can't or bots can't create business managers as well So here you're going to specify exactly what your primary purpose of the Facebook tools and platform is So if it's to promote goods or services or to provide services to other businesses If you're an agency you want to select this if you're selling your own products you want to select this and then you just click submit and Obviously, it hasn't filled out everything and it's going to redirect you to this page So it's going to prompt you to add a page to add ad accounts and we don't have anything added here and add extra security as well We don't have anything added here. We don't have any pages or ad accounts linked So we'll just walk you through exactly So you're gonna need to add in a primary page initially because you won't be able to add any client pages or ad accounts until you have this setup So basically Facebook is doing this to make sure people aren't creating fraudulent ad accounts or business managers So to do this you need to claim your business page and you can do that three different ways

## [03:04 - 05:31]

You initially need to go to business settings So you can go either up to this blue button here and click business settings This little tool here will also take you to business settings And then you can also go to this hamburger drop-down and then click business settings in this far right-hand side of the menu So you'll then be redirected to this page where you'll see people Partners pages ad accounts apps a whole slew of different data Basically what you're gonna want to focus on initially is people partners pages and ad accounts So don't worry about the rest here. You just want to look at those for now So now what you want to do is claim your page So go to pages here and then you want to click add and we've already claimed this page So essentially just to walk through it you want to click add and then you want to say add a page and You want to make sure that you're adding a page because this is Claiming a page that you already own so you can only claim a page once So you want to make sure that you're only claiming pages that you want to a hundred percent tie to this business manager So this is really important because you can't unclaim the page after you've claimed it So here what you want to do is you want to enter that page name or URL So we've already claimed our test page, but if you want as an example what you can do is pull up, you know eight loop social Click on that and if it doesn't show up initially here if it doesn't show up in the search bar what you could have to do is go to the URL of your business page and Just copy and paste that URL from the top menu bar and paste it in here So sometimes what happens is that if your page name changes It won't show up on this business manager page So you're gonna have to pull out the URL specifically for that page and then enter it in here and Then you just click add page and then you just click add page and assuming it's not claimed by anyone else It shouldn't be because it's your business. You'll just click add page and it'll add to your business manager So this is already claimed by another business manager So we just got to cancel out of here, but essentially you can add other people you can add other partners and then you can add Add accounts as well We're gonna go over how to add pages how to add people and how to add access to add accounts as well in the next video
